title: Spotlights or Something
description: Create aeronautics compatible dynamic cone spotlights using veil
body:
This mod adds create aeronautics compatible dynamic cone spotlights using veil or lambdynamiclights.

It is still in very active development and may be unstable. I'd recommend backing up your world, just in case. :)

You can choose light renderer of your preference in the mod settings screen:
- Lamb option supports shaders and is very good at compatibility. But its calculated on your cpu so its very bad at big lights. You must have LambDynamicLights 4.8.8 installed for it to work
- Veil option does not support shaders and can be very annoying with compatibility issues. BUT it uses shaders so it is perfectly smooth with whatever ranges you want.


it doesnt work on create contraptions for now (like basic mechanical bearings and such). use swivel bearings from aero


KNOWN ISSUES OF VEIL OPTION
- Shaders
- TACZ
- Create deep seas
- Amd graphics card? (it may or may not work)
- Macbooks? (same)
- Sodium 0.6 (you should use the 0.8.12 version)
- Artifacts with a black shape. Try turning your render distance up or light range down if you see it
- sometimes doesnt work in big modpacks, i would appreciate any info on more incompatibilities 

KNOWN ISSUES OF LAMB OPTION
- looks bad


You can right click both blocks to change their settings. They also change their brightness from redstone signal, 0 is off and 15 is max.
If you choose lamb option there will be an "alternative mode" option in searchlight block. it replaces cone with a sphere of light located where the beam should meet ground. Looks a bit different but its like the only option if you want lights beyond 50 blocks range when using lamb

If you want to get in contact, there is a thread in showcase section of create aernoautics discord. Its the only way for now

![You should name it Spotlights or Something](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e310d972ffa570dc421c0973adfbb56142880eb.png)
